message:
feat(pt-core): add CTW prequential predictor for sequence anomaly detection (cfon.7)

Implement Context Tree Weighting (CTW) universal predictor:
- Krichevsky-Trofimov estimator with Jeffreys prior for sequential probability
- Prequential log-loss computation for online anomaly detection
- Regret vs marginal baseline for normalized complexity
- Discretizer for continuous-to-discrete signal conversion (binary/ternary/quaternary)
- Evidence output for inference ledger integration

Also fix Debug trait issues in scan options to support progress emitters.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
